other_observers: Andrew Spencer; Mark Peterson saw some HETAs in the same area that we saw the bird. Mark saw the birds with a field trip that he lead into this ranch.
specific_location: Bader Ranch, just west of Road 109 between La Junta and Kim
description: It was red with dark auriclars, back, flanks, and upper tail. Flat headed compared to Summer Tanager. It also had a dark bill. The red on the breast and belly was not as bright of red as on the throat and head.Behaviors: A pair was flying back and forth to the nest and they were feeding the nestlings.Call: I can't remember if I heard one or not.Plumage: Adult
